classes.reasoning: This is a tabular adverse event case report form containing per-patient, per-cycle data capture fields (PATIENT_CODE, SITE_ID, CYCLE_ONSET, AE_TERM_VERBATIM, AE_MEDDRA_PT, AE_GRADE, AE_ONSET_DAY, etc.) for recording safety data during a clinical trial.

intervention: EGFR-targeted therapy (specific drug name not stated, likely tyrosine kinase inhibitor based on adverse event profile)
indication: Oncology (EGFR-mutated cancer, likely non-small cell lung cancer based on EGFR mutation types)
summary: This document is an adverse event case report form (CRF) capturing safety data for study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001, an oncology trial investigating an EGFR-targeted therapy. It records patient demographics, baseline characteristics (ECOG, EGFR mutation status, HER2 amplification), and detailed adverse event information including MedDRA coding, severity grading, causality assessment, management actions, and outcomes across multiple European sites.
